title: 0-to-1 CEX platform launch
situation: A centralized-exchange ecosystem required core trading, wallet, account, approval, routing, and risk-control foundations.
task: Lead the product and design function and define the platform scope.
action: Led modular requirements and technical pre-review while defining platform, ledger, approval, routing, and risk-control flows.
result: Delivered the 0-to-1 platform launch within four months.
lessons: Complex platform delivery benefits from modular requirements and early logic alignment.

title: Futures Grid Trading Bot
situation: A derivatives product required a grid-trading workflow spanning strategy choice, order logic, margin, liquidation, and return calculations.
task: Design the Web and App experience and its core product logic.
action: Defined neutral, long, and short strategies, arithmetic and geometric grids, margin and liquidation logic, order splitting, FILO matching, and return calculations.
result: Produced the end-to-end product design for the Futures Grid Trading Bot.

title: AI-assisted product development workflow
situation: Web3 product iteration involved repeated handoffs across product, UI/UX, front-end, and Figma work.
task: Create a constrained AI-assisted workflow from requirements to prototype.
action: Decomposed roles into agentic workflows and introduced IR mapping and design-system dictionary constraints.
result: Supported faster iteration from business requirements to PRDs, wireframes, semantic mappings, and high-fidelity prototypes.
